description: This is the main entry point for a Flutter mobile application. It defines the application's root widget MyApp and a home page widget _HomePage, which displays a basic UI with an app bar and a row containing text and a progress indicator.

classes.name: MyApp
classes.description: The root widget of the application, which sets up the MaterialApp with a title and a home widget.

classes.name: _HomePage
classes.description: A stateless widget representing the main screen, including an app bar and a body with some layout and a progress indicator.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Application entry point that runs the MyApp widget.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree for MyApp and _HomePage widgets.
